reasoning: The most recent market close price (2025-12-05) is 97.52. Weekly stock movements follow approximately a random walk with a very slight upward drift. Therefore, for the closest resolution date (Dec 14, 2025), I estimate the probability of being above 97.52 at 48%. For the medium date (Jan 06, 2026), the longer time horizon allows the overall trend of stock price growth to take effect, raising the probability to 52%.
